name: triad-territory-rush-online
description: Separated student and server-authenticated teacher pages for a teacher-controlled nine-slot classroom game.

scripts.test: node --check student-v3.js && node --check master-v3.js && node --check teacher-auth.js && node --check config.js && node --check server/server-v3.js && node --check server/secure-gateway.js && node scripts/smoke-test.js && node scripts/runtime-test.js
